controls.title: Classify sensitive financial and customer attributes
controls.requirement: All applicant and customer records are classified with Purview labels before retrieval.

controls.title: Lineage and source grounding
controls.requirement: Each memo statement must map to an approved source document and lineage entry.

controls.title: Retention and auditability
controls.requirement: Run traces and policy decisions must be retained for 365 days.
controls.purview_capability: Data estate governance and retention oversight
